title: Secret Dead Sea ScrollsFAR
wikitext:
[]: Secret Dead Sea Scrolls....FAR?             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 3:12 pm I have become confused about the "Secret Dead Sea Scrolls" they are one of two things: 1. They are a record written by Kabbalistic mystic sects thousands of years ago, which due to psychic ability or whatever, accurately predict the events of the series (the coming of the Angels, etc.) This is what I originally assumed they were. 2. ....or, are they an intentional set of instructions left behind by the "First Ancestral Race" that created Adam and Lilith? I am confused because under the original understanding: 1. No two Seeds of Life were ever meant to land on the same planet. Seeds come in two kinds: those possessing the "Fruit of Knowledge" and those possessing the "Fruit of Life", i.e. Liliths and Adams. Adam originally landed on Earth, and it is a cosmic accident that Lilith landed on Earth too, thus putting mankind in direct competition with the Angels. but if "2" is correct, and the "Secret Dead Sea Scrolls" were written BY the FAR..... then 2. Although the F.A.R. spread Liliths and Adams individually to many plants, with no two Seeds ever landing on the same world, Earth was a special, *intentional* experiment by the First Ancestral Race to intentionally put both kinds of Seed on one planet. Which begs the question: to what purpose? and "why don't they show up in the series if this experiment was their idea?" however, going against idea 2 is the Spears of Longinus; Adam's Spear, as the only surviving Spear on Earth, deactivated Adam rather than let both Seeds appear on Earth (Lilith's Spear was lost or destroyed so it couldn't) ....unless of couse, the F.A.R. intentionally left the Secret Dead Sea Scrolls behind for humans because they wanted the Lilim to spread on Earth, in which case, they would want to deactivate Adam. .....but no, that doesn't make sense: in that case, why bother sending Adam FIRST? They could have just sent Adam to a present-day Lilith-dominant planet if that was their true purpose. Furthermore, was there any problem with say, multiple Adams landing on the same planet? Functionally I think not, but that's no big deal. Nonetheless: Secret Dead Sea Scrolls: just made by humans who were mystic psychics thousands of years ago, or set of instructions left behind by the First Ancestral Race?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Nov 30, 2007 3:49 pm What evidence is there that the F.A.R. wrote the DDS/SDDS? Not clued in on at all on this.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 3:50 pm Zugzwang wrote: What evidence is there that the F.A.R. wrote the DDS/SDDS? Not clued in on at all on this.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 30, 2007 3:51 pm http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29#Dead_Sea_Scrolls Section D: "The Secret Dead Sea Scrolls are a scripture written by the First Ancestral Race, a manual regarding the Seed of Life (Progenitor Entity) and the usage of the Spear of Longinus security device, possibly while applying a scheme at the time of use to a religious group's own doctrines."

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 3:58 pm Ornette wrote: http://www.evageeks.org/FGP/Classified_Information_%28Translation%29#Dead_Sea_Scrolls Section D: "The Secret Dead Sea Scrolls are a scripture written by the First Ancestral Race, a manual regarding the Seed of Life (Progenitor Entity) and the usage of the Spear of Longinus security device, possibly while applying a scheme at the time of use to a religious group's own doctrines."

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:01 pm I'd assume it because more "canonical" as the info gets more secret, D being the highest confidentiality, as opposed to what the public knows.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:07 pm I really really hope Rebuild or Eva Chronicle sheds more light on this, as I don't know what to use at the moment. Because if the FAR *wanted* this to happen (as "leaving a set of instructions behind" implies)....why would Lilith *accidentally* land onto an Adam-based planet?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:14 pm It does sound really convoluted, but it's possible that line from the NGE2CI could be clarified a bit.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:21 pm Ornette wrote: It does sound really stupid.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:29 pm V wrote: Zugzwang wrote: What evidence is there that the F.A.R. wrote the DDS/SDDS? Not clued in on at all on this.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:35 pm Gendo said that when Nerv-02 blew up The SDSS serve exactly one purpose in NGE: to present the illusion that the two-dimensional evil zealot guys actually have something to base their delusions of grandeur on.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:47 pm V wrote: no I mean it gives them information about the coming of the Angels, specifically its where they get the Angel names.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Nov 30, 2007 4:57 pm It's possible they are for the event that a SoL lands on an already inhabited planet. And, by following the "instruction manual" unknowingly destroy themselves to make way for new life provided by the SoL.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 5:29 pm I'm treating this "Classified Information" info as unreliable and unsubstantiated until we can get more on it. Until such time as we get further info (Eva Chronicle?) I'm going with the "they were predicted by humans using psychic powers" thing. I really really wish they had made this clearer I'm still treating Lilith's landing as a cosmic accident

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Nov 30, 2007 5:35 pm V wrote: I'm going with the "they were predicted by humans using psychic powers" thing.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 6:06 pm speculative; the source is unreliable; need to put this on the "list o things to check on"

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Nov 30, 2007 6:06 pm Dead Sea Scrolls (in NGE) has written the whole history of mankind, past, present, and the future. In conclusion the only ‘thing’ that could have written, are the ‘observers’ of such events (might be implying the First Ancestral Race), and this shows that the whole history of mankind runs in circles, fixed to destiny. (Note: Ring Cycle, Eternal Recurrence etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 6:11 pm er....no. The First Ancestral Race didn't visit Earth for billions of years. Indeed, they probably didn't directly contact it but sent the Seeds.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 30, 2007 7:06 pm V wrote: I'm going with the "they were predicted by humans using psychic powers" thing.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Nov 30, 2007 7:08 pm Seeds come in two kinds: those possessing the "Fruit of Knowledge" and those possessing the "Fruit of Life", i.e. Liliths and Adams.
